emails.subject: TXU Gas Company
emails.body: Debra Attached is a worksheet for a Master Firm Purchase/Sale with TXU Gas Company. Please prepare a draft at your earliest convenience, as we need to send out to the counterparty immediately to execute a term deal. I will forward the email address of the contact at TXU Gas as soon as possible. Please call me with any questions. Thanks, JRW

emails.subject: RE: TXU Gas Company
emails.body: RE: TXU Gas Company Do you have an email address?

emails.subject: RE: TXU Gas Company
emails.body: Debra I've got a call into the originator looking for this; I'll pass it along ASAP. Thanks, JRW
